briefs.title: Port Land Valuation Regulation updated for 2025 taxation year with higher inflation adjustment
briefs.summary: BC amended the Port Land Valuation Regulation to apply assessed values as at December 31, 2024 for the 2025 taxation year, and increased the inflation adjustment formula by one percentage point above the standard percentage change.
briefs.action_required: Review your 2025 property tax assessment if you own or lease port land in BC.

key_dates.label: BC Port Land Valuation Regulation 2025 taxation year takes effect

briefs.industries: Transportation & Logistics, Natural Resources, Landlord & Property Mgmt
